Uses of Annotation Interface
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.Rest

Packages that use Rest
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.microservice.jetty.resources
Predefined Jetty Microservice Resources
org.apache.juneau.microservice.management
Actuator-style management-surface endpoints (microservice-module flavors).
org.apache.juneau.microservice.resources
Predefined Microservice Resources
org.apache.juneau.petstore.jetty
Apache Juneau Petstore - Jetty/Microservice deployment.
org.apache.juneau.petstore.rest
Petstore REST resources.
org.apache.juneau.petstore.springboot
Apache Juneau Petstore - Spring Boot deployment.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server
REST Server API
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.config
Predefined REST configuration interfaces
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.convention
Convention-endpoints mixin pack — composable @Rest(mixins=...) resources that ship the "internet conventions" surface (favicon, robots, sitemap, version, well-known) every public-facing service eventually grows.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.docs
API-docs mixin pack — composable @Rest(mixins=...) resources that publish Swagger v2 and OpenAPI 3.1 spec endpoints with Swagger-UI and Redoc HTML mounts.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.health
 
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.management
Actuator-style management-surface endpoints (server-module flavors).
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.mcp
Stateless Model Context Protocol (MCP) endpoint built on juneau-rest-server using the juneau-bean-mcp wire types.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.metrics.micrometer
Micrometer bridge for the juneau-rest-server MetricsRecorder SPI.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.ops
Ops / introspection mixin pack — composable @Rest(mixins=...) resources that ship the operational surface (request echo, JVM admin, route index) every long-running Juneau service eventually grows.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.rdf.config
 
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet
REST Servlets
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.springboot
Spring Boot Integration
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.staticfile
REST Static Files Support
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view
Engine-agnostic server-side-rendered view extension point.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.freemarker
Apache FreeMarker view-rendering bridge — opt-in juneau-rest-server-view-freemarker module.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.jsp
JSP view-rendering bridge — opt-in juneau-rest-server-view-jsp module.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.mustache
Mustache view-rendering bridge — opt-in juneau-rest-server-view-mustache module.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.thymeleaf
Thymeleaf view-rendering bridge — opt-in juneau-rest-server-view-thymeleaf module.
org.apache.juneau.server.config.rest
Server Configuration REST

    Class
    Description

    DebugResource
    Microservice debug utilities.

  • Uses of Rest in org.apache.juneau.microservice.management

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.microservice.management with annotations of type Rest
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    BasicActuatorGroup
    Convenience assembly of the Actuator-style management surface under a single configurable path prefix.
    class 
    InfoMixin
    Mixin flavor of the /info endpoint: renders the running application's manifest (build/version/git metadata) resolved from the host bean store.
    class 
    InfoResource
    Child-resource flavor of the /info endpoint.

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.microservice.resources with annotations of type Rest
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ConfigResource
    Shows contents of the microservice configuration file.
    class 
    DirectoryResource
    REST resource that allows access to a file system directory.
    class 
    LogsResource
    REST resource for viewing and accessing log files.
    class 
    SampleRootResource
    Sample root REST resource.
    class 
    ShutdownResource
    Provides the capability to shut down this REST microservice through a REST call.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description

    RootResources
    Root router resource for the Jetty deployment.

  • Uses of Rest in org.apache.juneau.petstore.rest

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.petstore.rest with annotations of type Rest
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    PetFreemarkerViewResource
    Petstore FreeMarker view demo.
    class 
    PetMustacheViewResource
    Petstore Mustache view demo.
    class 
    PetSecureResource
    Secure analogue of PetStoreResource demonstrating Juneau's BearerTokenGuard + StubBearerTokenValidator pattern.
    class 
    PetStoreResource
    Petstore CRUD REST resource.
    class 
    PetstoreUiResource
    Petstore React SPA demo — serves the no-build single-page React UI from the core classpath.

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.petstore.springboot with annotations of type Rest
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    HelloResource
    Tiny REST resource that demonstrates Spring @Autowired injection into a Juneau @Rest servlet under a Spring Boot deployment.
    class 
    RootResources
    Root router resource for the Spring Boot deployment.

  • Uses of Rest in org.apache.juneau.rest.server

    Fields in org.apache.juneau.rest.server declared as Rest
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final Rest
    RestAnnotation.DEFAULT
    Default value
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.server that return Rest
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Rest
    RestAnnotation.Builder.build()
    Instantiates a new @Rest object initialized with this builder.
    Rest
    AbstractRestBuilder.toRestAnnotation()
    Returns the synthetic @Rest annotation carrying all builder-set members, for use as the highest-priority contributor of the @Rest resolution chain.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.server that return types with arguments of type Rest
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected Optional<AnnotationInfo<Rest>>
    RestContext.getRestAnnotation()
    Returns the nearest Rest annotation on this resource.
    protected List<AnnotationInfo<Rest>>
    RestContext.getRestAnnotations()
    Returns all Rest annotations on the resource class hierarchy, in child-to-parent order.
    protected List<AnnotationInfo<Rest>>
    RestContext.getRestAnnotationsTopDown()
    Returns the Rest annotations for this resource in parent-to-child (top-down) order.

  • Uses of Rest in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.config

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.config with annotations of type Rest
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    BasicJson5Config
    Basic configuration for a REST resource that supports JSON 5 transport.
    interface 
    BasicJsonConfig
    Basic configuration for a REST resource that supports JSON transport.
    interface 
    BasicJsonHtmlConfig
    Basic configuration for a REST resource that supports JSON and HTML transport.
    interface 
    BasicOpenApiConfig
    Basic configuration for a REST resource that supports OpenAPI transport.
    interface 
    BasicPrototextConfig
    Basic configuration for a REST resource that supports Protobuf Text Format transport.
    interface 
    BasicTomlConfig
    Basic configuration for a REST resource that supports TOML transport.
    interface 
    BasicUniversalConfig
    Predefined configuration for a REST resource that supports all languages and provides common default configuration values.
    interface 
    BasicYamlConfig
    Basic configuration for a REST resource that supports YAML transport.
    interface 
    DefaultConfig
    Predefined REST configuration that defines common default values for all configurations.

  • Uses of Rest in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.convention

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.convention with annotations of type Rest
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    FaviconMixin
    Mixin that serves a favicon.ico icon at /favicon.ico.
    class 
    FaviconResource
    Child-resource flavor of the FaviconMixin mixin.
    class 
    FaviconServlet
    Standalone servlet companion of the FaviconMixin mixin.
    class 
    SeoMixin
    Mixin that serves SEO-conventional endpoints /robots.txt and /sitemap.xml.
    class 
    VersionMixin
    Mixin that serves deployment-introspection metadata at /version (configurable).
    class 
    VersionResource
    Child-resource flavor of the VersionMixin version/build-metadata capability.
    class 
    VersionServlet
    Standalone servlet companion of the VersionMixin mixin.
    class 
    WellKnownMixin
    Mixin that serves RFC 8615 /.well-known/* discovery endpoints.

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.docs with annotations of type Rest
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    OpenApiMixin
    Mixin that publishes the OpenAPI 3.1 spec endpoints for a resource.
    class 
    RedocMixin
    Mixin that publishes the Redoc HTML view at /redoc for the OpenAPI 3.1 spec.
    class 
    SwaggerMixin
    Mixin that publishes the Swagger v2 spec endpoint at /api/*.
    class 
    SwaggerUiMixin
    Mixin that publishes the Swagger-UI HTML view at /swagger.

    Class

    Mixin flavor of the built-in health/readiness/liveness probe capability.

    HealthServlet

    Class

    Mixin flavor of the diagnostic dump endpoints (/threaddump, /heapdump).
    class

    Child-resource flavor of the /loggers runtime log-level management endpoint.

    Class
    Description
    class 
    McpRestServlet
    Drop-in BasicRestServlet subclass that exposes a single MCP JSON-RPC endpoint at POST /.

  • Uses of Rest in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.metrics.micrometer

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.metrics.micrometer with annotations of type Rest
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    MetricsMixin
    Mixin flavor of the /metrics endpoint: renders a Prometheus scrape from a consumer-provided Micrometer MeterRegistry resolved from the host bean store.
    class 
    MetricsResource
    Child-resource flavor of the /metrics endpoint.

  • Uses of Rest in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.ops

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.ops with annotations of type Rest
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AdminMixin
    Mixin that serves operational-introspection endpoints under /admin/*: thread dump, heap statistics, configurable cache-flush hooks, and rate-limit-bucket inspection.
    class 
    AdminResource
    Child-resource flavor of the AdminMixin mixin.
    class 
    AdminServlet
    Standalone servlet companion of the AdminMixin mixin.
    class 
    EchoMixin
    Mixin that serves a request-echo / round-trip introspection endpoint at /echo/* (configurable).
    class 
    ErrorMixin
    Mixin providing the residual [* /error] endpoint.
    class 
    HtdocMixin
    Mixin providing the residual [GET /htdocs/*] static-file endpoint.
    class 
    NavigationMixin
    Mixin providing the group-navigation endpoint ([GET /]) that lists the host resource's child resources.
    class 
    RouteIndexMixin
    Mixin that exposes a content-negotiated index of all @RestOp-annotated methods on the host resource (and any other mixins on it) at /options (configurable).
    class 
    StatsMixin
    Mixin providing the residual [GET /stats] timing-statistics endpoint.

    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description

    BasicUniversalJenaConfig
    Identical to BasicUniversalConfig but includes RDF marshalling support.

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet with annotations of type Rest
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    BasicRestResource
    Identical to BasicRestServlet but doesn't extend from HttpServlet.
    class 
    BasicRestResourceGroup
    Identical to BasicRestServletGroup but doesn't extend from HttpServlet.
    class 
    BasicRestServlet
    Subclass of RestServlet with default settings and standard endpoints defined.
    class 
    BasicRestServletGroup
    Specialized subclass of BasicRestServlet for showing "group" pages.

    Subclass of SpringRestServlet with default settings and standard endpoints defined.

    Specialized subclass of BasicSpringRestServlet for showing "group" pages.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description

    StaticFilesMixin
    Mixin that serves static files from the active StaticFiles implementation under /static/* (configurable).

    StaticFilesResource
    Child-resource flavor of the static-files capability.
    class 
    StaticFilesServlet
    Standalone servlet companion of the StaticFilesMixin mixin.
